capability_status.note: sub-bit expert PQ output divergence remains a large perturbation; the durable campaign explores geometry-before-rate and escalates rate where sub-bit fails the capability threshold. No capability pass or Event Horizon is claimed.

01_full_run_status_not_started.note: live process/lease/heartbeat probe, not committed JSON

02_first_light_reclassified_calibration.note: First-Light sealed as calibration with boundary statement

03_source_receipt_valid.note: 543 tensors, 7 shards present, manifest rebuilt to real path

05_candidate_c_seed_frozen_green.note: Candidate C / Event Horizon Seed frozen and green

08_pq_aware_doctor_complete.note: PQ-aware Doctor within budget, no uncounted dense residual

09_direct_compact_cpu_path_green.note: direct compact matvec CPU reference matches dense within tolerance

11_cpu_metal_scientific_parity_green.note: same ranking, same pass/fail, bounded metric delta

12_expert_gate_green.note: representative expert sample across layers ran on real source

13_full_layer_gate_green.note: all-expert single-layer gate ran (bounded sample labelled)

16_quality_contract_sealed.note: gates 1-7 + invariants + tolerances sealed before promotion

20_resource_admission_green.note: disk headroom > 60 GiB; no competing HAWKING heavy owner (MoP is a separate CPU-bound project; PQ campaign is MPS/GPU-bound; contention flagged)

21_status_heartbeat_green.note: hawking status reflects live truth; stale PID does not report RUNNING

24_no_competing_heavy_hawking_process.note: no hawking heavy owner holds the lease

gate_law: No red gate is made green by weakening its threshold after seeing results.
ignition_semantics: Ignition launches the DURABLE SEARCH campaign over the complete program. It requires apparatus readiness green (source/program/contract/controller/parity/crash-resume/singleton/status). It does NOT assert a sub-bit capability pass; the campaign measures capability per-row and escalates rate per the program stopping rules.
